value.body:
## Context

`packages/ui/SPEC.md` describes the target shared UI package. The desktop renderer still owns reusable product panels and presentation logic.

## Outcome

Reusable product UI moves into `@cycle/ui`; desktop renderer becomes a thin adapter for routing, queries, mutations, IPC, and DTO mapping.

## Acceptance criteria

- Move reusable issues, inbox, views, repository history, settings, create issue, and issue detail UI into presentational `@cycle/ui` components where appropriate.
- Add Storybook coverage for first-class component states.
- Keep `@cycle/ui` free of React Query, Electron, API clients, routing hooks, and app runtime imports.
- Add architecture/import tests that protect package boundaries.
- Desktop typecheck and UI Storybook build pass.

frontmatter.title: Productionize @cycle/ui and migrate reusable desktop panels into it

value.title: Productionize @cycle/ui and migrate reusable desktop panels into it
